blocks.markdown:
# Демо: продуктовая аналитика

Пример нарративного отчёта в quackbook на данных учебника «SQL 101: Рецепты продуктового аналитика». Виджеты ниже пересчитываются по загруженным таблицам `demo_users` и `demo_payments`.

blocks.title: Дневная аудитория (DAU)
blocks.sql: SELECT CAST(DateUTC AS DATE) AS day, count(DISTINCT UserID) AS dau FROM demo_users GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
blocks.caption: Уникальные пользователи по дням.

blocks.title: Накопительная выручка
blocks.sql: SELECT day, sum(daily_revenue) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS cumulative_revenue, daily_revenue FROM (SELECT CAST(DateUTC AS DATE) AS day, sum(CAST(RevenueUSD AS DOUBLE)) AS daily_revenue FROM demo_payments GROUP BY 1) ORDER BY day;

blocks.title: A/B: конверсия в оплату
blocks.sql: SELECT u.ControlOrTest AS variant, count(DISTINCT u.UserID) AS users, count(DISTINCT p.UserID) AS payers, round(100.0 * count(DISTINCT p.UserID) / count(DISTINCT u.UserID), 2) AS conversion_pct FROM demo_users u LEFT JOIN demo_payments p ON CAST(p.UserID AS BIGINT) = u.UserID GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
blocks.caption: Конверсия по группам A/B.
